이사야 46:1.content: Bel bows down. Nebo stoops. Their idols are carried by animals, and on the livestock. The things that you carried around are heavy loads, a burden for the weary.

이사야 46:2.content: They stoop and they bow down together. They could not deliver the burden, but they have gone into captivity.

이사야 46:3.content: “Listen to me, house of Jacob, and all the remnant of the house of Israel, that have been carried from their birth, that have been carried from the womb.

이사야 46:4.content: Even to old age I am he, and even to gray hairs I will carry you. I have made, and I will bear. Yes, I will carry, and will deliver.

이사야 46:5.content: “To whom will you compare me, and consider my equal, and compare me, as if we were the same?

이사야 46:6.content: Some pour out gold from the bag, and weigh silver in the balance. They hire a goldsmith, and he makes it a god. They fall down— yes, they worship.

이사야 46:7.content: They bear it on their shoulder. They carry it, and set it in its place, and it stands there. It cannot move from its place. Yes, one may cry to it, yet it can not answer. It cannot save him out of his trouble.

이사야 46:8.content: “Remember this, and show yourselves men. Bring it to mind again, you transgressors.

이사야 46:9.content: Remember the former things of old: for I am God, and there is no other. I am God, and there is none like me.

이사야 46:10.content: I declare the end from the beginning, and from ancient times things that are not yet done. I say: My counsel will stand, and I will do all that I please.

이사야 46:11.content: I call a ravenous bird from the east, the man of my counsel from a far country. Yes, I have spoken. I will also bring it to pass. I have planned. I will also do it.

이사야 46:12.content: Listen to me, you stubborn-hearted, who are far from righteousness!

이사야 46:13.content: I bring my righteousness near. It is not far off, and my salvation will not wait. I will grant salvation to Zion, my glory to Israel.
